description: Rustynet MCP server manifest — three stdio JSON-RPC servers providing repo context, gate running, and lab state management for AI agents.

servers.name: rustynet-mcp-repo-context
servers.description: Structured access to the Rustynet documentation graph, requirements, security controls/findings, architecture constraints, role transitions, platform support, and crate structure. 16 tools + MCP resources (docs) + prompts.
servers.resources: Curated documentation index exposed as rustynet-doc:// resources (resources/list + resources/read).
servers.working_dir: <baked at build time via build.rs; CWD-independent>

servers.name: rustynet-mcp-gate-runner
servers.description: Runs Rustynet quality gates on demand — cargo fmt, check, clippy, test, build, audit, deny, and phase-specific CI scripts. Every command runs under a kill-on-timeout watchdog. 9 tools.
servers.working_dir: <baked at build time via build.rs; CWD-independent>

servers.name: rustynet-mcp-lab-state
servers.description: Queries/manages the UTM VM lab AND drives the autonomous overnight live-lab loop (run → catch bugs → patch → re-verify) via async background jobs. Live-lab runs launch detached (start_live_lab_run returns a job_id instantly, survives an MCP-server reload); poll get_job_status (completion-record-first, pid-reuse-safe), read structured results with get_run_result, read logs with bounded tail_job_log / read_report_artifact, reclaim disk with prune_jobs. Runs default to source-mode working-tree (deploys uncommitted patches), auto-topology (fills Windows+macOS from the inventory for full 3-OS coverage), and accept a >24h timeout_secs. wait_for_job blocks until done (no busy-poll); explain_stage maps a failed stage to its owning file + common causes. Short ops run under a kill-on-timeout watchdog. 24 tools + an overnight-loop prompt.
servers.working_dir: <baked at build time via build.rs; CWD-independent>

notes: The repo root is baked into each binary at compile time (build.rs), so the servers resolve documents/ and crates/ regardless of the client's working directory. Override with the RUSTYNET_REPO_ROOT env var if needed.
